description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The structure is primarily white with large, open interior spaces and several partitioned rooms. The front facade opens onto a spacious wooden deck, furnished with outdoor tables and umbrellas, suggesting an area for relaxation or social gatherings. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped on the sides and others facing the front, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior walls appear to be constructed from concrete or plaster, while the deck is made of wood. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious wooden front deck with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large wooden deck, and outdoor seating with umbrellas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white exterior walls and the extension of the wooden deck with tables.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with minimal window openings and a clear view of the building's flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the deck and the arrangement of outdoor furniture.
